sparql_editor.title: SPARQL Query & Update
sparql_editor.helpInfo: The SPARQL Query & Update view is a unified editor for queries and updates. Enter any SPARQL query or update and click Run to execute it. The view also allows you to save queries for future retrieval and execution in the SPARQL editor.

on_auto_execute_query.title: Confirm execution
on_auto_execute_query.message:
This is an update and it may change the data in the repository.
Are you sure you want to execute it automatically?

running_queries_warning.queries_non_updates: You have running {queriesCount, plural, =0 {0 queries} one {1 query} other {# queries}}. The {queriesCount, plural, =0 {} one {query} other {queries}} will be aborted.
running_queries_warning.none_queries_updates: You have running {updatesCount, plural, =0 {0 updates} one {1 update} other {# updates}}. You have running {updatesCount, plural, one {1 update} other {# updates}}.
running_queries_warning.queries_updates: You have running {queriesCount, plural, =0 {0 queries} one {1 query} other {# queries}} and {updatesCount, plural, =0 {0 updates} one {1 update} other {# updates}}. The {queriesCount, plural, one {query} other {queries}} will be aborted.

url_param.invalid_repo: The repository "{{repositoryId}}" specified in the URL does not exist. Please select an existing repository.
url_param.invalid_repo_continue: The repository "{{repositoryId}}" specified in the URL does not exist. You can continue with the current repository "{{currentRepositoryId}}" or select another repository.
url_param.remote_location_repo_continue: The repository "{{repositoryId}}" specified in the URL does not exist in current location. You can continue with the current repository "{{currentRepositoryId}}" or select it from the menu.
url_param.change_active_repo: Active repository will be changed to "{{repositoryId}}". Do you want to proceed?
